testcase.name: categoriesPopupOpens

failure.message: Expected at least one known category to render expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Expected at least one known category to render expected [true] but found [false] at com.shopcart.tests.F4_SearchByCategoryTest.categoriesPopupOpens(F4_SearchByCategoryTest.java:19) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 34 stack frames
